[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11110110 6
1 01101000 3
2 11001011 5
3 00011111 5
4 11100110 5
5 10100001 3
6 01111001 5
7 11001111 6

12 21 11111111 a
23 32 11100111 6

45 54 11111101 7
56 65 11110110 6 match 0
67 76 11111110 7
70 07 11101011 6

35 53 10100101 4
46 64 11111111 a
57 75 11101100 5
60 06 11111111 a
71 17 01111111 7

14 41 01111111 7

36 63 11110111 7
47 74 01111001 5 match 6
50 05 11001111 6 match 7
61 16 11111111 a
72 27 11101110 6
